Diplomacy Engine

                        defenderHistory: ViolationHistory): Option[PrestigeEvent] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Handle pact violation detected during combat Per diplomacy.md:8.1.2 Automatically converts to Enemy status Source   Edit

                 history: ViolationHistory; turn: int): Option[DiplomaticEvent] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
